<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q65258929]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Ōtori Shrine''' (大鷲神社, also pronounced Ōwashi Shrine) refers to a name for various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] across Japan. These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ōtori taisha]] as their main shrine. Many are related to other shrines with similar names, such as {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}. Several are also widely known for hosting {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festivals. There are seven such shrines officially recognized as religious corporations nationwide.
For related terms, see {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|日鷲神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ōtori taisha]] as their main shrine. For related terms, see {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ōtori taisha]] as their main shrine. These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ōtori taisha]] as their main shrine. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

Several are also widely known for hosting {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festivals. There are seven such shrines officially recognized as religious corporations nationwide.
For related terms, see {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

Many are related to other shrines with similar names, such as {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}. Several are also widely known for hosting {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festivals. There are seven such shrines officially recognized as religious corporations nationwide.
For related terms, see {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Ōkunitama Shrine|Ōkunitama Shrine]]. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).
== Related Terms == * [[:en:Otori|Otori]] * {{ill|Ōwashi (disambiguation)|ja|大鷲 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōwashi (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大鷲|1=Ōwashi (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442005}} * {{ill|Shiratori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|白鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 白鳥神社}} * {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}}

* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Ōkunitama Shrine|en|Ōkunitama Shrine|WD=Q611678|lt=Ōkunitama Shrine}}. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q65258929]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade}}]] '''Ōtori Shrine''' (大鷲神社, also pronounced Ōwashi Shrine) refers to a name for various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} across Japan. These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ōtori taisha}} as their main shrine. Many are related to other shrines with similar names, such as {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}. Several are also widely known for hosting {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festivals. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Ōkunitama Shrine|en|Ōkunitama Shrine|WD=Q611678|lt=Ōkunitama Shrine}}. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).

These shrines are part of the {{ill|Ōtori faith|ja|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, with {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ōtori taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} as their main shrine. Many are related to other shrines with similar names, such as {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}. Several are also widely known for hosting {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festivals. There are seven such shrines officially recognized as religious corporations nationwide.
For related terms, see {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}, and {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|大鷲神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Tedegaki, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|大鷲神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takaya, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|大鷲神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yanagihara, Ichihara City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja|大鷲神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kitahatori, Narita City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|ja|大鷲神社 (栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Sakae)|qq=}} - Located in Anjō, Sakae Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja|大鷲神社 (酒々井町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Shisui)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kamiiwahashi, Shisui Town, Inba District, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} - Located in Hanahata, Adachi Ward, Tokyo. Known as the origin of Tori-no-Ichi. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Miyamachi, Fuchū City, Tokyo. A subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Ōkunitama Shrine|en|Ōkunitama Shrine|WD=Q611678|lt=Ōkunitama Shrine|1=Ōkunitama Shrine}}. * Ōtori Shrine - Located in Makane-chō, Minami Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Consolidated into the precincts of a {{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Konpira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira Shrine|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (see {{ill|Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|1=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}).
== Related Terms == * {{ill|Otori|en|Otori|WD=Q56038914|lt=Otori|1=Otori}} * {{ill|Ōwashi (disambiguation)|ja|大鷲 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōwashi (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大鷲|1=Q11442005|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442005}} * {{ill|Shiratori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|白鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiratori Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 白鳥神社}} * {{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}}
